summary: The shard contains two independent ready-for-maintainer PRs, not one mergeable canonical cluster. #85296 is the useful Codex timeout repair path for the runtime-budget half of #85242, but it is dirty and needs branch repair plus fresh review/checks before merge. #85621 is unrelated skill wording work and should stay open as an independent PR until its branch is refreshed and failing proof is rerun.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair PR #85296 on its contributor branch so the Codex app-server terminal-idle watchdog derives from the effective run timeout for the runtime-budget half of #85242, without taking on the separate diagnostic wording follow-up.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(codex): derive terminal-idle watchdog from effective run timeout
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## What Problem This Solves

Codex app-server turns with a run-specific timeout above 30 minutes can still be cut short by the terminal-idle watchdog because current main resolves that watchdog from the 30-minute default unless an explicit override is set.

## Why This Change Was Made

This repairs the existing contributor PR #85296 from @alkor2000 instead of opening a replacement. The branch should stay focused on the runtime-budget half of #85242: derive the terminal-idle watchdog from the effective run timeout, keep shorter completion/post-tool guards separate, and keep the issue open for the diagnostic wording follow-up.

## User Impact

Long scheduled Codex app-server turns should no longer be silently limited by the lower hardcoded terminal-idle default when the effective run timeout is higher.

## Evidence

Current main d84a8b15063aa09418fe532a7ec99d04e4a93bfe still resolves terminal idle from CODEX_TURN_TERMINAL_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS and does not pass params.timeoutMs into resolveCodexTurnTerminalIdleTimeoutMs. Upstream Codex SDK turn options expose outputSchema and signal, not a turn timeout, so OpenClaw owns this wrapper-level watchdog. Required validation: pnpm test extensions/codex/src/app-server/attempt-timeouts.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts; pnpm check:changed; Codex /review after branch repair.
credit_notes: Repair contributor branch for #85296 by @alkor2000; preserve author credit on the PR branch and in the final merge metadata.
Keep #85242 open after merge because #85296 intentionally uses Refs #85242 and leaves terminal-idle-specific diagnostic guidance as follow-up.
